title: Referenced node not executed error in workflow
symptom: When executing a workflow with multiple triggers, an error occurs stating 'Referenced node is unexecuted' when the second trigger is used.
applies_when: Using multiple triggers in a workflow
root_cause: In n8n, when using multiple triggers, nodes that depend on the output of a specific trigger may not execute if that trigger is not the one that initiated the workflow. This leads to errors when trying to reference data from unexecuted nodes.
fix_steps: Add a Merge node to your workflow
Configure the Merge node to use the 'Append' option
Connect the output of both triggers to the Merge node
Use the output from the Merge node in subsequent nodes
agent_instruction: Add a Merge node with the Append option to combine outputs from both triggers.
